title: Assist in the preparation of turf surfaces for play
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist in the preparation of turf surfaces for play demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare the site for sports turf preparation activities

pcs.text: Confirm sports turf set-up plan and work activity with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sports turf set-up plan and work activity with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sports turf set-up plan and work activity with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, and assess risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Check the site condition and report irregularities to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the site condition and report irregularities to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the site condition and report irregularities to supervisor.

elements.title: Collect equipment required for sports turf preparation

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability of, fit and use personal protective equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability of, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select and check tools and equipment and rectify or report faults to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check tools and equipment and rectify or report faults to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check tools and equipment and rectify or report faults to supervisor.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-start checks according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-start checks according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start checks according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Transport equipment safely to site according to regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport equipment safely to site according to regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport equipment safely to site according to regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to workplace set-up procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to workplace set-up procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to workplace set-up procedures.

pcs.text: Follow site safety requirements and monitor and direct sports users
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow site safety requirements and monitor and direct sports users?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow site safety requirements and monitor and direct sports users.

elements.title: Use equipment to prepare turf grass playing surface

pcs.text: Check equipment and attachments to ensure fit and adjustments according to set-up plan and operator instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment and attachments to ensure fit and adjustments according to set-up plan and operator instructions.

pcs.text: Operate equipment in a consistent and uniform manner

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate equipment in a consistent and uniform manner.

pcs.text: Collect and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures.

elements.title: Mark out playing surface for play

pcs.text: Select and check turf surface marking tools and equipment, and report faults according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check turf surface marking tools and equipment, and report faults according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check turf surface marking tools and equipment, and report faults according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate lines, markers and match play equipment according to set-up plan, rules and regulations of intended sport.

pcs.text: Place lines, markers and match play equipment according to set-up plan and intended sport, and to reduce wear on playing surface

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place lines, markers and match play equipment according to set-up plan and intended sport, and to reduce wear on playing surface.

pcs.text: Conduct preparation and marking-out activities within the timeframe of the sports event schedule and set-up plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct preparation and marking-out activities within the timeframe of the sports event schedule and set-up plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain continuous oversight of turf preparation activities, and report any irregularities to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes to supervisor.
